creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 233635
Log of events from failure to reboot

After a router restart caused my network to fail over to my backup connection, a "service netif restart wlan0" triggered a driver crash that required a system reboot to recover. I did not attempt to unload and load the driver as that has often paniced the system and I did not to delay recovery.

Network device: Intel AX200
System: Lenovo L-15 (Gen. 1)
OS:FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n250504-f66bb161ab7

I am attaching log messages of the failure.

After a reboot of the system, everything returned to normal.
